title: PeerGroupUpdate.role field unbounded
description: ClearMessage::PeerGroupUpdate has role: Option<String> with no deserialize_with guard. A hostile peer sends role: "x".repeat(10MB); the receiver allocates without limit. The action field adjacent to it has deserialize_group_action, but role was missed. Fix: add deserialize_opt_bounded_id on role (128-byte cap is appropriate for a role name).
